ff.name: Fastball
ff.description: Standard four-seam fastball with high velocity

regression_data.notes: High zone rate pitch. Best when paired with offspeed. Presence > Control + Accuracy

ch.name: Changeup
ch.description: Off-speed pitch that looks like a fastball. Best BABIP suppression.

regression_data.notes: LOWEST BABIP (.147) - elite weak contact. Good chase rate. Rotation > Stuff + Presence

cu.name: Curveball
cu.description: Breaking ball with 12-6 movement. Highest CSW rate.

regression_data.notes: HIGHEST CSW (.394) - elite strikeout pitch. Low chase rate so needs command. Presence > Accuracy > Control

sl.name: Slider
sl.description: Breaking ball with lateral movement. Elite chase rate.

regression_data.notes: T1 pitch. Good chase rate but higher BABIP - needs tunneling. Control > Rotation, Persuasion

si.name: Sinker
si.description: Two-seam fastball with downward movement. Ground ball inducer.

regression_data.notes: Ground ball specialist pitch. High zone contact but weak contact. Stuff > Persuasion, Control, Rotation

fc.name: Cutter
fc.description: Fastball with late cutting action. Excellent weak contact.

regression_data.notes: Excellent BABIP (.166) - very weak contact. Rotation + Stuff + Persuasion > Presence + Control

kc.name: Knuckle Curve
kc.description: Curveball gripped like a knuckleball. Solid all-around pitch.

regression_data.notes: T1 pitch. Good CSW, balanced performance. Stuff + Accuracy >> Persuasion, Rotation, Presence

fs.name: Splitter
fs.description: Split-finger fastball with sharp downward break. Elite chase rate.

regression_data.notes: T1 ELITE pitch. Best chase rate, high CSW, low BABIP. Complete package.

st.name: Sweeper
st.description: Slider with exaggerated horizontal break. Very weak contact allowed.

regression_data.notes: Very low BABIP (.190), good CSW. Elite weak contact pitch.
